title: [codereview-pass1] parse_legacy_logs regex too permissive for Zephyr logs
description: scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py:72 - re.search only looks for 8+ hex after hash= but Zephyr may have full 16byte hashes or prefixed with 0x; no specific Zephyr pattern. tagged codereview
close_reason: Updated zephyr regex for 0x prefix and 16-byte hashes; ruff clean, follows no-oracles violation
